expectations.evidence: 'OCP is not an atomic principle. It is an emergent property...'
'DIP creates the plug; OCP plugs new things into it. You cannot have OCP without DIP.'
'LSP is the precondition that makes extension actually extension and not modification at a distance.'
'SRP defines the axis of variation; OCP keeps that axis open while freezing the rest.'
Explicit ASCII dependency graph SRP→ISP→DIP→LSP→OCP and four-move action list
